public_reputation: Young herd-scout whose horn calls mark wolves, rustlers, and washed roads.
manner: Keeps attention split between conversation and the next necessary movement. In Zootia, that reads as someone practical, supply-aware, and season-conscious, attentive to material reliability over display, and the habits of a scouts still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of scouts in and around Zootia, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Zootia workable through the obligations of scouts while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Zootia.
hidden_pressure: Must turn uncertain terrain and changing terms into something people can actually traverse. Around Zootia, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of scouts visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Fenna Stockwhistle will share route intelligence, hidden timing, or safer alternatives if the party proves useful under travel pressure.
Fenna Stockwhistle needs help reading a blocked path, escorting traffic, or reopening safe movement through Zootia.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained.
public_signal: Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Fenna Stockwhistle lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Zootia: roads, caravan nodes, docks, ferries, route desks, or loading seams
who_avoids_them: those who do not respect route discipline
